name: graph_search
description: Find related pages by traversing entity connections in the knowledge graph. Provide qa_ids from document search results as starting points for graph traversal. Discovers additional pages linked through shared entities (MENTIONED_IN, RELATES_TO edges).

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project

query.description: The search query (used as fallback for entity name matching when qa_ids are not provided)

qa_ids.description: QA IDs from document search results to use as starting points for graph traversal

document_id.description: Optional document ID to limit search scope

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10)
